items.title: Prep for Aembit <> CTC meeting on May 14 at 4pm PT
items.context: Email from kdiaz@aembit.io on May 1: Katlyn confirmed '4p PT on May 14th' for the follow-up meeting with CTC.

items.title: Follow up with Gio on response to 7 diligence questions
items.context: Email from gio@octane.security on Apr 29: 'Thanks for sharing. Will follow up on this' — responding to Stephanie's detailed questions on AI commoditization, migration, ICP expansion, GTM, TAM, pricing, and competitive breakdown.

items.title: Email Barak to share DD progress and indicate syndication interest ($500K-$2M)
items.context: Email from Logan on May 3: 'Would indicate that we will continue to show early value here and make introductions to our network... not in a position to lead but can consider syndication, pending lead/terms, which is typically a check size of $500K-$2M.'

items.title: Huddle on strategy to secure allocation in Opti round
items.context: Email from Richie on May 1: 'Barak hasn't officially launched the process or signaled that he has a term sheet / pricing expectations. If we aren't in a position to price this round & we're circling around ~$500k - ~$1.5M check, we need to huddle on how to best secure our place here.'

items.title: Follow up with Brian Sykes (NextEra) and Ashwin to schedule call after Brian's vacation
items.context: Email from Brian.Sykes@nexteraenergy.com on May 4: 'I'll be on vacation starting Tuesday but would be happy to chat once I'm back. Do you have a link where I can book time?'

items.title: Monitor VanishID round process — Matt expects term sheets in coming weeks
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Apr 28: 'A few investors shared that they are waiting for our quarterly results... We expect a strong result and anticipate term sheets in the coming weeks.' Also asked 'Are you interested in preempting?'
